title: ROMANIA enforcement action against BLUE PROJECTS S.R.L. (2,500)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,500 on BLUE PROJECTS S.R.L. The controller experienced a data breach due to the inadequate technical and organisational measures in place to ensure data security. This affected the confidentiality and availability...
